description: Meta (Facebook) developer platform navigator: always-current Graph API version from the changelog, predefined doc links per product (Graph, Pages, Instagram, WhatsApp, Messenger, Marketing), platform conventions — tokens, fields, pagination, errors, webhooks — and required-permissions answers with App Review awareness. Includes /meta-api:check and a Meta-keyword reminder hook. Meta platform only; defers general third-party doc verification to api-docs-first and designing your own APIs to api-design.

Codex fidelity: 2 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
